claude_code.task: CC Cowork audit fixes: live data, mobile, WHOOP, gating
claude_code.summary: Cowork audit fixes deployed. Priority 1: CC now fetches WORK_STATUS.json on each render for real agent data (branch/task/status/timestamps). Priority 3: mobile toolbar buttons tighter. Priority 4: WHOOP health endpoint now has CORS header — CC modal can reach it from browser. WORK_STATUS.json updated with real state. 8/8 live checks pass.
